ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Detailed medical history of the participant */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Medical diagnosis of the participant */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent (e.g., given, withdrawn) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the session belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the session took place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., baseline, follow-up) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the session */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_sessions" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the participant participated in the session */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed treatment information for the session */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Detailed outcome information for the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the participant's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, study coordinator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active or inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the participant
